sourceText: She championed knowledge and reason, striving to maintain an intellectual community amidst conflict by teaching philosophy and science to students from diverse backgrounds. Her teachings represented the power of reason against violence and fanaticism.
translatedText: Ia menjunjung tinggi pengetahuan dan nalar, berjuang untuk menjaga komunitas intelektual di tengah konflik dengan mengajarkan filsafat dan sains kepada mahasiswa dari berbagai latar belakang. Ajarannya melambangkan kekuatan nalar melawan kekerasan dan fanatisme.

sourceText: Late Antiquity
translatedText: Antik Akhir

sourceText: Ibn Al Haytham faced significant challenges due to the political turmoil of his era and the resistance to his novel ideas. A notable instance involved his assignment to a dam construction project by the Fatimid ruler Al-Hakim. When the project proved unfeasible according to his designs, he experienced profound disappointment and frustration.
translatedText: Ibn Al Haytham menghadapi tantangan signifikan karena gejolak politik di eranya dan penolakan terhadap ide-ide barunya. Contoh yang menonjol adalah penugasannya dalam proyek pembangunan bendungan oleh penguasa Fatimiyah Al-Hakim. Ketika proyek tersebut terbukti tidak layak berdasarkan rancangannya, ia mengalami kekecewaan dan frustrasi yang mendalam.

sourceText: Despite these setbacks, his passion for knowledge remained undeterred. The eventual cessation of his administrative duties freed him to focus intensely on his scholarly pursuits. During his confinement and subsequent years, he delved deeper into optics, mathematics, and scientific methodology, producing seminal works that would cement his legacy as the 'Father of Optics'.
translatedText: Meskipun menghadapi kemunduran ini, semangatnya untuk ilmu pengetahuan tidak pernah padam. Berakhirnya tugas-tugas administratifnya akhirnya membebaskannya untuk fokus secara intens pada kegiatan ilmiahnya. Selama masa penahanannya dan tahun-tahun berikutnya, ia menyelami lebih dalam optik, matematika, dan metodologi ilmiah, menghasilkan karya-karya penting yang akan mengukuhkan warisannya sebagai 'Bapak Optik'.

sourceText: Late 10th to Early 11th Century
translatedText: Akhir Abad ke-10 hingga Awal Abad ke-11

sourceText: Blaise Pascal
translatedText: Blaise Pascal

sourceText: Pascal suffered from chronic illnesses and neuralgia from a young age. His life was also marked by profound religious and philosophical introspection, which caused him considerable internal turmoil. His posthumously published 'Pensées' vividly illustrates this inner conflict.
translatedText: Pascal menderita penyakit kronis dan neuralgia sejak usia muda. Hidupnya juga diwarnai oleh introspeksi religius dan filosofis yang mendalam, yang menyebabkan gejolak batin yang cukup besar. 'Pensées' karyanya yang diterbitkan secara anumerta dengan jelas menggambarkan konflik batin ini.

sourceText: Despite his physical suffering, Pascal relentlessly pursued intellectual inquiry. He transformed his suffering into an object of faith, seeking spiritual solace and answers through deep reflection on human existence's paradoxes and divine grace.
translatedText: Meskipun menderita secara fisik, Pascal tanpa henti mengejar penyelidikan intelektual. Ia mengubah penderitaannya menjadi objek iman, mencari penghiburan spiritual dan jawaban melalui refleksi mendalam tentang paradoks keberadaan manusia dan rahmat ilahi.

sourceText: 17th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-17

sourceText: Mendeleev's early life was marked by poverty and the absence of his father, and his non-noble status presented obstacles to academic opportunities. Furthermore, upon the initial presentation of his periodic table, he faced skepticism and a lack of recognition from many of his peers.
translatedText: Masa muda Mendeleev ditandai oleh kemiskinan dan ketiadaan ayahnya, dan statusnya yang bukan bangsawan menjadi penghalang bagi peluang akademis. Lebih lanjut, pada presentasi awal tabel periodiknya, ia menghadapi skeptisisme dan kurangnya pengakuan dari banyak rekan-rekannya.

sourceText: He overcame academic adversities through relentless research and dedication. His unwavering commitment to systematically classifying elements led to the completion of the periodic table, which ultimately became recognized as his monumental achievement.
translatedText: Ia mengatasi kesulitan akademis melalui penelitian dan dedikasi yang tanpa henti. Komitmennya yang tak tergoyahkan untuk mengklasifikasikan unsur-unsur secara sistematis mengantarkannya pada penyelesaian tabel periodik, yang akhirnya diakui sebagai pencapaian monumentalnya.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: Ada Lovelace
translatedText: Ada Lovelace

sourceText: Rigorous education enforced by her mother, societal judgment due to her father's scandalous life, persistent health issues, and a struggle with gambling.
translatedText: Pendidikan ketat yang diterapkan oleh ibunya, penilaian masyarakat akibat kehidupan skandal ayahnya, masalah kesehatan yang terus-menerus, dan perjuangan melawan judi.

sourceText: She found solace and intellectual fulfillment by focusing on mathematics and logic, and by collaborating with Charles Babbage, she brought her visionary ideas to fruition.
translatedText: Ia menemukan penghiburan dan pemenuhan intelektual dengan berfokus pada matematika dan logika, dan dengan berkolaborasi bersama Charles Babbage, ia mewujudkan ide-ide visionernya.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: Alan Turing
translatedText: Alan Turing

sourceText: He was prosecuted in 1952 for homosexual acts, a criminal offense at the time, and was subjected to chemical castration. This deeply impacted his career and mental well-being.
translatedText: Ia dituntut pada tahun 1952 karena tindakan homoseksual, sebuah tindak pidana pada masa itu, dan dikenai kastrasi kimia. Hal ini sangat memengaruhi karier dan kesehatan mentalnya.

sourceText: Through his groundbreaking research and theoretical work, he paved the way for the digital age. His contributions were posthumously recognized, and his legacy was eventually restored and honored.
translatedText: Melalui penelitian terobosan dan karya teoretisnya, ia membuka jalan bagi era digital. Kontribusinya diakui secara anumerta, dan warisannya akhirnya dipulihkan dan dihormati.

sourceText: 20th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-20

sourceText: Charles Babbage
translatedText: Charles Babbage

sourceText: The development of his groundbreaking machines, particularly the Analytical Engine, was hampered by a lack of funding and government support. He often faced financial difficulties and criticism from contemporaries who failed to grasp his vision.
translatedText: Pengembangan mesin-mesin terobosannya, khususnya Mesin Analitis, terhambat oleh kurangnya pendanaan dan dukungan pemerintah. Ia sering menghadapi kesulitan keuangan dan kritik dari rekan-rekan sezaman yang gagal memahami visinya.

sourceText: Despite financial constraints and technical challenges, Babbage persevered. He continuously refined his ideas, improved his designs, and tirelessly explained the significance of his work. Although his machines were not completed in his lifetime, his monumental designs profoundly influenced the development of computer science for future generations.
translatedText: Meskipun menghadapi kendala keuangan dan tantangan teknis, Babbage gigih. Ia terus-menerus menyempurnakan idenya, meningkatkan desainnya, dan tanpa lelah menjelaskan pentingnya karyanya. Meskipun mesin-mesinnya tidak selesai dalam masa hidupnya, desain monumentalnya sangat memengaruhi perkembangan ilmu komputer untuk generasi mendatang.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: He faced political turmoil and periods of exile, which disrupted his scholarly pursuits and writing. His fame also attracted envy and opposition from some contemporaries.
translatedText: Ia menghadapi gejolak politik dan masa pengasingan, yang mengganggu kegiatan ilmiah dan penulisannya. Ketenarannya juga menarik kecemburuan dan penolakan dari beberapa rekan sezaman.

sourceText: Despite the challenges, Ibn Sina maintained an unwavering dedication to his studies. He persevered through constant research and writing, producing a vast body of work that cemented his legacy and overcame the obstacles he faced.
translatedText: Meskipun menghadapi tantangan, Ibnu Sina mempertahankan dedikasi yang tak tergoyahkan pada studinya. Ia gigih melalui penelitian dan penulisan yang konstan, menghasilkan banyak karya yang mengukuhkan warisannya dan mengatasi hambatan yang dihadapinya.

sourceText: Late 10th - Early 11th Century
translatedText: Akhir Abad ke-10 - Awal Abad ke-11

sourceText: Early steam engines were inefficient and prone to frequent breakdowns, leading to business difficulties. Watt also faced significant emotional distress due to patent disputes and conflicts with business partners.
translatedText: Mesin uap awal tidak efisien dan rentan terhadap kerusakan yang sering terjadi, mengakibatkan kesulitan bisnis. Watt juga menghadapi tekanan emosional yang signifikan karena sengketa paten dan konflik dengan mitra bisnis.

sourceText: Through persistent research and experimentation, he developed the innovative idea of a separate condenser, drastically increasing the steam engine's efficiency. Furthermore, by collaborating with Matthew Boulton, he expanded his business and resolved patent issues, overcoming his challenges.
translatedText: Melalui penelitian dan eksperimen yang gigih, ia mengembangkan ide inovatif tentang kondensor terpisah, secara drastis meningkatkan efisiensi mesin uap. Lebih lanjut, dengan berkolaborasi dengan Matthew Boulton, ia memperluas bisnisnya dan menyelesaikan masalah paten, mengatasi tantangannya.

sourceText: 18th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-18

sourceText: George Stephenson
translatedText: George Stephenson

sourceText: Born into poverty with limited formal education, Stephenson faced significant disadvantages. His groundbreaking ideas were often met with skepticism and technical limitations of the era, making the path to innovation arduous.
translatedText: Lahir dalam kemiskinan dengan pendidikan formal yang terbatas, Stephenson menghadapi kerugian besar. Ide-ide terobosannya sering kali disambut dengan skeptisisme dan keterbatasan teknis di eranya, membuat jalan menuju inovasi menjadi sulit.

sourceText: He pursued self-education in mechanical engineering, working tirelessly day and night. Despite numerous setbacks and failures, Stephenson's relentless dedication to developing the steam locomotive eventually earned him recognition and paved the way for the railway age.
translatedText: Ia mengejar pendidikan mandiri di bidang teknik mesin, bekerja tanpa lelah siang dan malam. Meskipun mengalami banyak kemunduran dan kegagalan, dedikasi Stephenson yang tanpa henti untuk mengembangkan lokomotif uap akhirnya memberinya pengakuan dan membuka jalan bagi era kereta api.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: Gregor Mendel
translatedText: Gregor Mendel

sourceText: Mendel experienced profound frustration as his groundbreaking research went unrecognized and largely forgotten during his lifetime. While his papers were published, the scientific community failed to grasp their significance immediately. He also struggled with limited time for research due to his responsibilities as a monk and educator.
translatedText: Mendel mengalami frustrasi mendalam karena penelitian terobosannya tidak diakui dan sebagian besar terlupakan selama masa hidupnya. Meskipun makalah-makalahnya diterbitkan, komunitas ilmiah gagal memahami signifikansinya secara langsung. Ia juga berjuang dengan keterbatasan waktu untuk penelitian karena tanggung jawabnya sebagai biarawan dan pendidik.

sourceText: Despite the lack of contemporary recognition, Mendel persevered with his experiments. His work was rediscovered posthumously, leading to his acclaim as the Father of Genetics. He remained steadfast in his scientific pursuits with patience, which ultimately allowed his discoveries to be recognized.
translatedText: Meskipun kurangnya pengakuan kontemporer, Mendel gigih dengan eksperimennya. Karyanya ditemukan kembali secara anumerta, mengantarkannya pada pengakuan sebagai Bapak Genetika. Ia tetap teguh dalam pengejaran ilmiahnya dengan kesabaran, yang pada akhirnya memungkinkan penemuannya diakui.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: Antoine Lavoisier
translatedText: Antoine Lavoisier

sourceText: As a wealthy tax collector ('fermier général') during the French Revolution, he was targeted by the revolutionary government and guillotined.
translatedText: Sebagai pemungut pajak kaya ('fermier général') selama Revolusi Prancis, ia menjadi sasaran pemerintah revolusioner dan digulotin.

sourceText: Despite his tragic end, his scientific contributions were widely recognized posthumously, laying the foundation for modern chemistry.
translatedText: Meskipun akhir hidupnya tragis, kontribusi ilmiahnya diakui secara luas secara anumerta, meletakkan dasar bagi kimia modern.

sourceText: 18th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-18

sourceText: He experienced significant frustration due to setbacks in his official career, multiple failures in civil service examinations, and the pervasive inaccuracy and confusion within existing medical texts.
translatedText: Ia mengalami frustrasi yang signifikan karena kemunduran dalam karier resminya, beberapa kegagalan dalam ujian pegawai negeri, serta ketidakakuratan dan kebingungan yang meluas dalam teks-teks medis yang ada.

sourceText: Despite these adversies, driven by a steadfast desire to aid the common people, he traveled extensively for 27 years, personally collecting herbs, meticulously studying medical literature, and ultimately completing the Bencao Gangmu.
translatedText: Meskipun menghadapi kesulitan ini, didorong oleh keinginan yang teguh untuk membantu rakyat biasa, ia bepergian secara ekstensif selama 27 tahun, secara pribadi mengumpulkan herbal, mempelajari literatur medis dengan cermat, dan akhirnya menyelesaikan Bencao Gangmu.

sourceText: Ming Dynasty
translatedText: Dinasti Ming

sourceText: Guglielmo Marconi
translatedText: Guglielmo Marconi

sourceText: Initially, his ideas were met with skepticism, with many dismissing them as impractical. Securing funding and convincing established scientific and industrial circles proved to be significant hurdles.
translatedText: Awalnya, ide-idenya disambut dengan skeptisisme, dengan banyak yang menganggapnya tidak praktis. Mendapatkan pendanaan dan meyakinkan kalangan ilmiah dan industri yang sudah mapan terbukti menjadi rintangan yang signifikan.

sourceText: Through persistent experimentation and demonstration, he gradually gained recognition for his technology. The successful transatlantic wireless transmission was a pivotal moment that validated his innovations.
translatedText: Melalui eksperimen dan demonstrasi yang gigih, ia secara bertahap mendapatkan pengakuan atas teknologinya. Transmisi nirkabel transatlantik yang sukses adalah momen penting yang memvalidasi inovasinya.

sourceText: Late 19th - Early 20th Century
translatedText: Akhir Abad ke-19 - Awal Abad ke-20

sourceText: Robert Koch
translatedText: Robert Koch

sourceText: Initial lack of funding and skepticism from peers. He faced debate, particularly after identifying the cholera bacillus, rather than immediate acceptance.
translatedText: Kurangnya pendanaan awal dan skeptisisme dari rekan-rekan. Ia menghadapi perdebatan, terutama setelah mengidentifikasi basil kolera, alih-alih penerimaan langsung.

sourceText: Through persistent experimentation and rigorous proof, he solidified his discoveries. He focused on pursuing the truth, undeterred by criticism.
translatedText: Melalui eksperimen yang gigih dan bukti yang ketat, ia mengukuhkan penemuannya. Ia fokus pada pengejaran kebenaran, tidak terpengaruh oleh kritik.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: Thomas Aquinas
translatedText: Thomas Aquinas

sourceText: He faced familial opposition to his religious vocation, including being held captive by his own family. He also encountered internal dissent and suspicion within his Dominican order.
translatedText: Ia menghadapi penolakan keluarga terhadap panggilan religiusnya, termasuk ditahan sebagai tawanan oleh keluarganya sendiri. Ia juga menghadapi perbedaan pendapat internal dan kecurigaan dalam ordo Dominikan-nya.

sourceText: Aquinas persevered through sheer intellectual brilliance and steadfast dedication to his studies and faith. His prolific writings demonstrate his ability to overcome these obstacles and establish his profound legacy.
translatedText: Aquinas gigih melalui kecemerlangan intelektual murni dan dedikasi teguh pada studi dan imannya. Karya-karya tulisnya yang produktif menunjukkan kemampuannya untuk mengatasi hambatan ini dan membangun warisannya yang mendalam.

sourceText: High Middle Ages
translatedText: Abad Pertengahan Tinggi

sourceText: Rumi faced immense upheaval in his life, including forced migration from his homeland in Balkh (modern-day Afghanistan) due to the Mongol invasions, settling in Konya (modern-day Turkey). The most profound pain, however, was the mysterious disappearance and presumed murder of his spiritual mentor and companion, Shams-i Tabrizi, which plunged Rumi into deep grief and existential crisis.
translatedText: Rumi menghadapi gejolak besar dalam hidupnya, termasuk migrasi paksa dari tanah kelahirannya di Balkh (Afganistan modern) karena invasi Mongol, menetap di Konya (Turki modern). Namun, rasa sakit yang paling mendalam adalah hilangnya secara misterius dan dugaan pembunuhan mentor spiritual dan sahabatnya, Shams-i Tabrizi, yang menjerumuskan Rumi ke dalam kesedihan mendalam dan krisis eksistensial.

sourceText: The loss of Shams became a catalyst for Rumi's most creative and prolific period. Instead of succumbing to despair, Rumi channeled his grief and profound love for Shams into his poetry and music. He transformed his pain into ecstatic devotion, composing his monumental works, most notably the Masnavi, which became a beacon of spiritual wisdom and a testament to the transformative power of love and loss.
translatedText: Kehilangan Shams menjadi katalis bagi periode paling kreatif dan produktif Rumi. Alih-alih menyerah pada keputusasaan, Rumi menyalurkan kesedihan dan cinta mendalamnya kepada Shams ke dalam puisi dan musiknya. Ia mengubah rasa sakitnya menjadi pengabdian ekstatis, menggubah karya-karya monumentalnya, terutama Masnavi, yang menjadi mercusuar kebijaksanaan spiritual dan bukti kekuatan transformatif cinta dan kehilangan.

sourceText: 13th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-13

sourceText: He faced intense opposition from religious authorities, accusations of heresy, and the burning of his books, leading to restrictions on his scholarly work.
translatedText: Ia menghadapi penolakan keras dari otoritas agama, tuduhan bid'ah, dan pembakaran buku-bukunya, menyebabkan pembatasan pada karya ilmiahnya.

sourceText: Despite persecution, his ideas were defended and his writings were secretly preserved, eventually influencing the European Renaissance and beyond.
translatedText: Meskipun dianiaya, ide-idenya dibela dan tulisannya disimpan secara rahasia, akhirnya memengaruhi Renaisans Eropa dan seterusnya.

sourceText: 12th Century Islamic Golden Age
translatedText: Zaman Keemasan Islam Abad ke-12

sourceText: William James
translatedText: William James

sourceText: Suffered from severe neurasthenia and depression in his youth, and endured difficult times with multiple career changes and personal anguish.
translatedText: Menderita neurastenia dan depresi parah di masa mudanya, dan mengalami masa-masa sulit dengan beberapa perubahan karier dan penderitaan pribadi.

sourceText: Deeply reflected on his painful experiences, emphasizing the importance of human consciousness and will based on them, and overcame them through an active attitude towards life.
translatedText: Merefleksikan secara mendalam pengalaman-pengalaman menyakitkannya, menekankan pentingnya kesadaran dan kemauan manusia berdasarkan pengalaman tersebut, dan mengatasinya melalui sikap aktif terhadap kehidupan.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: Friedrich Schiller
translatedText: Friedrich Schiller

sourceText: Repression in an authoritarian environment, illness, financial hardship, and conflicts with friends.
translatedText: Represi dalam lingkungan otoriter, penyakit, kesulitan keuangan, dan konflik dengan teman-teman.

sourceText: He overcame adversity with an unwavering belief in freedom and human dignity, realizing his ideals through literature and establishing himself as a leading intellectual of his time.
translatedText: Ia mengatasi kesulitan dengan keyakinan teguh pada kebebasan dan martabat manusia, mewujudkan cita-citanya melalui sastra dan menjadikan dirinya sebagai intelektual terkemuka pada masanya.

sourceText: Late 18th - Early 19th Century
translatedText: Akhir Abad ke-18 - Awal Abad ke-19

sourceText: George Washington Carver
translatedText: George Washington Carver

sourceText: Born into slavery, he faced significant health challenges as a child, including pneumonia, and the systemic racism that limited opportunities for African Americans. He was often referred to as the 'plant doctor' due to his early affinity for healing plants, but formal education was a struggle.
translatedText: Lahir sebagai budak, ia menghadapi tantangan kesehatan yang signifikan sebagai seorang anak, termasuk pneumonia, serta rasisme sistemik yang membatasi kesempatan bagi warga Afrika-Amerika. Ia sering disebut sebagai 'dokter tanaman' karena ketertarikannya sejak dini pada penyembuhan tanaman, namun pendidikan formal adalah perjuangan.

sourceText: Despite these hardships, his intellectual curiosity and dedication led him to pursue higher education. He earned advanced degrees in botany and agricultural science. Carver dedicated his life to sharing his knowledge, particularly with poor Southern farmers, helping them improve soil fertility and achieve economic independence through innovative uses for common crops.
translatedText: Meskipun menghadapi kesulitan ini, rasa ingin tahu intelektual dan dedikasinya mendorongnya untuk mengejar pendidikan tinggi. Ia memperoleh gelar lanjutan di bidang botani dan ilmu pertanian. Carver mendedikasikan hidupnya untuk berbagi pengetahuannya, terutama dengan petani miskin di Selatan, membantu mereka meningkatkan kesuburan tanah dan mencapai kemandirian ekonomi melalui penggunaan inovatif untuk tanaman umum.

sourceText: Late 19th - Early 20th Century
translatedText: Akhir Abad ke-19 - Awal Abad ke-20

sourceText: Profound existential doubt and a spiritual crisis that led him to abandon his academic career.
translatedText: Keraguan eksistensial yang mendalam dan krisis spiritual yang membuatnya meninggalkan karier akademisnya.

sourceText: Through critical examination of philosophy and a deep dive into Sufi mysticism and spiritual contemplation, he found renewed purpose and certainty.
translatedText: Melalui pemeriksaan kritis terhadap filsafat dan penyelaman mendalam ke dalam mistisisme Sufi serta kontemplasi spiritual, ia menemukan tujuan dan kepastian yang diperbarui.

sourceText: Late 11th - Early 12th Century
translatedText: Akhir Abad ke-11 - Awal Abad ke-12

sourceText: He experienced political turmoil, imprisonment, and exile, leading to an unstable life. He also suffered the loss of family and colleagues due to the Black Death.
translatedText: Ia mengalami gejolak politik, pemenjaraan, dan pengasingan, menyebabkan kehidupan yang tidak stabil. Ia juga menderita kehilangan keluarga dan rekan kerja karena Wabah Hitam.

sourceText: Despite hardships, he never lost his passion for scholarship. Instead, he used these experiences as a foundation to write the Muqaddimah, filled with profound insights into human society and civilization.
translatedText: Meskipun menghadapi kesulitan, ia tidak pernah kehilangan semangatnya untuk keilmuan. Sebaliknya, ia menggunakan pengalaman-pengalaman ini sebagai dasar untuk menulis Muqaddimah, yang dipenuhi dengan wawasan mendalam tentang masyarakat dan peradaban manusia.

sourceText: 14th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-14

sourceText: In his youth, Maimonides and his family were forced to flee their home in Al-Andalus due to religious persecution under Muslim rule, living as refugees for many years. This period was marked by profound insecurity and suffering.
translatedText: Di masa mudanya, Maimonides dan keluarganya terpaksa melarikan diri dari rumah mereka di Al-Andalus karena penganiayaan agama di bawah kekuasaan Muslim, hidup sebagai pengungsi selama bertahun-tahun. Periode ini ditandai oleh ketidakamanan dan penderitaan yang mendalam.

sourceText: Despite these adversities, his pursuit of knowledge remained unyielding. Through relentless study and writing, he produced the monumental 'Mishneh Torah,' a comprehensive codification of Jewish law, and 'The Guide for the Perplexed,' a philosophical masterpiece. He transformed his personal suffering into intellectual triumph.
translatedText: Meskipun menghadapi kesulitan ini, pengejaran pengetahuannya tetap tak tergoyahkan. Melalui studi dan penulisan yang tak henti-hentinya, ia menghasilkan 'Mishneh Torah' yang monumental, sebuah kodifikasi komprehensif hukum Yahudi, dan 'The Guide for the Perplexed,' sebuah mahakarya filosofis. Ia mengubah penderitaan pribadinya menjadi kemenangan intelektual.

sourceText: Middle Ages (12th Century)
translatedText: Abad Pertengahan (Abad ke-12)

sourceText: Zoroaster faced significant opposition and persecution from established religious authorities and society as he attempted to spread his new faith. His teachings were often misunderstood and rejected, leading to periods of isolation and doubt.
translatedText: Zoroaster menghadapi penolakan dan penganiayaan yang signifikan dari otoritas agama dan masyarakat yang mapan saat ia berusaha menyebarkan keyakinan barunya. Ajarannya sering disalahpahami dan ditolak, menyebabkan periode isolasi dan keraguan.

sourceText: He overcame these challenges through unwavering conviction and profound insight into truth. Through meditation and spiritual discipline, he received revelations from Ahura Mazda, solidifying his belief in the correctness of his message. He persistently preached his ideas, eventually gaining a substantial following.
translatedText: Ia mengatasi tantangan ini melalui keyakinan yang tak tergoyahkan dan wawasan mendalam tentang kebenaran. Melalui meditasi dan disiplin spiritual, ia menerima wahyu dari Ahura Mazda, mengukuhkan keyakinannya pada kebenaran pesannya. Ia secara gigih mengkhotbahkan ide-idenya, akhirnya mendapatkan pengikut yang cukup besar.

sourceText: In his youth, Cervantes was captured by Barbary pirates while serving in Italy and spent five years as a slave. Upon his return to Spain, he faced financial difficulties and imprisonment, making his life far from easy.
translatedText: Di masa mudanya, Cervantes ditangkap oleh bajak laut Barbar saat bertugas di Italia dan menghabiskan lima tahun sebagai budak. Sekembalinya ke Spanyol, ia menghadapi kesulitan keuangan dan pemenjaraan, membuat hidupnya jauh dari mudah.

sourceText: Despite these adversities, he never lost his passion for literature. His vivid experiences and profound understanding of human nature were transformed into immortal works like Don Quixote.
translatedText: Meskipun menghadapi kesulitan ini, ia tidak pernah kehilangan semangatnya untuk sastra. Pengalaman-pengalamannya yang jelas dan pemahaman mendalam tentang sifat manusia diubah menjadi karya-karya abadi seperti Don Quixote.

sourceText: Spanish Golden Age
translatedText: Zaman Keemasan Spanyol

sourceText: Leo Tolstoy
translatedText: Leo Tolstoy

sourceText: Leo Tolstoy
translatedText: Leo Tolstoy

sourceText: Tolstoy grappled with profound anguish stemming from his brutal experiences in the Crimean War, conflicts with loved ones, and a lifelong spiritual crisis. The search for life's meaning and the fear of death tormented him.
translatedText: Tolstoy bergulat dengan penderitaan mendalam yang berasal dari pengalaman brutalnya dalam Perang Krimea, konflik dengan orang-orang terkasih, dan krisis spiritual seumur hidup. Pencarian makna hidup dan ketakutan akan kematian menyiksanya.

sourceText: He sought to overcome these struggles through literary exploration and deep introspection. Tolstoy found simple truths in the lives of peasants and strived for spiritual peace through non-violent resistance and asceticism. His works are the culmination of this struggle and reflection.
translatedText: Ia berusaha mengatasi perjuangan ini melalui eksplorasi sastra dan introspeksi mendalam. Tolstoy menemukan kebenaran sederhana dalam kehidupan para petani dan berjuang untuk kedamaian spiritual melalui perlawanan tanpa kekerasan dan asketisme. Karya-karyanya adalah puncak dari perjuangan dan refleksi ini.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: Murasaki Shikibu
translatedText: Murasaki Shikibu

sourceText: The early death of her mother, the limitations placed upon women pursuing scholarship, and the loneliness experienced amidst the complex human relationships of court life.
translatedText: Kematian dini ibunya, keterbatasan yang diberlakukan pada wanita yang mengejar pendidikan, dan kesepian yang dialami di tengah hubungan manusia yang rumit dalam kehidupan istana.

sourceText: She sublimated her inner suffering by creating 'The Tale of Genji,' drawing upon her keen observation and delicate sensibility. Furthermore, through the medium of literature, she delicately depicted the lives and emotions of women of her time, thereby overcoming the limitations of her era and building her own world.
translatedText: Ia menyalurkan penderitaan batinnya dengan menciptakan 'Kisah Genji', mengambil inspirasi dari pengamatan tajam dan kepekaan halus. Selain itu, melalui media sastra, ia dengan halus menggambarkan kehidupan dan emosi wanita pada masanya, dengan demikian mengatasi keterbatasan eranya dan membangun dunianya sendiri.

sourceText: Heian Period
translatedText: Periode Heian

sourceText: Edgar Degas
translatedText: Edgar Degas

sourceText: He faced financial pressures from his father and doubts about traditional academic art training. Later in life, he suffered from progressive vision loss.
translatedText: Ia menghadapi tekanan keuangan dari ayahnya dan keraguan tentang pelatihan seni akademis tradisional. Di kemudian hari, ia menderita kehilangan penglihatan progresif.

sourceText: Degas pursued his unique artistic vision throughout his life, refusing to be confined by tradition and forging a new path with his distinctive perspective and techniques. Despite his failing eyesight, he explored various mediums, including sculpture, maintaining his passion for art.
translatedText: Degas mengejar visi artistiknya yang unik sepanjang hidupnya, menolak untuk terbatasi oleh tradisi dan menciptakan jalan baru dengan perspektif dan teknik khasnya. Meskipun penglihatannya menurun, ia menjelajahi berbagai media, termasuk patung, mempertahankan semangatnya terhadap seni.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: Oscar Wilde
translatedText: Oscar Wilde

sourceText: Persecution due to societal prejudice and moral judgment, leading to unjust imprisonment and profound suffering.
translatedText: Penganiayaan karena prasangka sosial dan penilaian moral, mengakibatkan pemenjaraan yang tidak adil dan penderitaan mendalam.

sourceText: Despite immense hardship, he maintained his passion for art, using his writing to express his truths and experiences, thereby seeking spiritual freedom.
translatedText: Meskipun menghadapi kesulitan besar, ia mempertahankan semangatnya untuk seni, menggunakan tulisannya untuk mengungkapkan kebenaran dan pengalamannya, dengan demikian mencari kebebasan spiritual.

sourceText: Late 19th Century
translatedText: Akhir Abad ke-19

sourceText: Rabindranath Tagore
translatedText: Rabindranath Tagore

sourceText: He faced societal constraints and personal tragedies, yet his spirit remained unbroken, finding solace and expression through his art.
translatedText: Ia menghadapi kendala sosial dan tragedi pribadi, namun semangatnya tetap tak terpatahkan, menemukan penghiburan dan ekspresi melalui seninya.

sourceText: Through his prolific writing and profound philosophical insights, Tagore transformed his experiences into universal messages of hope, resilience, and the interconnectedness of all beings.
translatedText: Melalui tulisan-tulisannya yang produktif dan wawasan filosofis yang mendalam, Tagore mengubah pengalamannya menjadi pesan-pesan universal tentang harapan, ketahanan, dan keterhubungan semua makhluk.

sourceText: Late 19th - Early 20th Century
translatedText: Akhir Abad ke-19 - Awal Abad ke-20

sourceText: The pain of having her intellectual pursuits restricted due to her gender within strict religious and societal norms. She endured the threat of the Inquisition and the envy and criticism of her fellow nuns.
translatedText: Rasa sakit karena kegiatan intelektualnya dibatasi karena gendernya di tengah norma-norma agama dan masyarakat yang ketat. Ia menanggung ancaman Inkuisisi serta kecemburuan dan kritik dari rekan-rekan biarawatinya.

sourceText: She persevered by continuing her writing and scholarly research, refusing to suppress her intellectual curiosity. She defended her convictions without yielding, even using these challenges as material for her works, deepening their literary richness.
translatedText: Ia gigih dengan melanjutkan penulisan dan penelitian ilmiahnya, menolak untuk menekan rasa ingin tahu intelektualnya. Ia membela keyakinannya tanpa menyerah, bahkan menggunakan tantangan ini sebagai materi untuk karya-karyanya, memperdalam kekayaan sastra mereka.

sourceText: 17th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-17

sourceText: Li Qingzhao
translatedText: Li Qingzhao

sourceText: She endured profound hardships, including the death of her husband, forced displacement due to the Jurchen invasion, and the loss of her cherished collection of books and art.
translatedText: Ia menanggung kesulitan yang mendalam, termasuk kematian suaminya, pengungsian paksa karena invasi Jurchen, dan hilangnya koleksi buku dan seni kesayangannya.

sourceText: Despite these tribulations, she continued to write poetry, meticulously collecting scattered texts and creating new works, transforming her sorrow into art.
translatedText: Meskipun menghadapi cobaan ini, ia terus menulis puisi, mengumpulkan teks-teks yang tersebar dengan cermat dan menciptakan karya-karya baru, mengubah kesedihannya menjadi seni.

sourceText: Song Dynasty
translatedText: Dinasti Song

sourceText: The early death of his father and the subsequent fall of his family led to an unstable life. Even after achieving fame, he relentlessly pursued poetic perfection, grappling with deep inner turmoil.
translatedText: Kematian dini ayahnya dan kejatuhan keluarganya kemudian menyebabkan kehidupan yang tidak stabil. Bahkan setelah mencapai ketenaran, ia tanpa henti mengejar kesempurnaan puitis, bergulat dengan gejolak batin yang mendalam.

sourceText: Through profound communion with nature, he grasped the essence of life. His extensive travels broadened his understanding of the world, elevating his poetic realm. His struggles were transmuted into profound verse.
translatedText: Melalui persekutuan mendalam dengan alam, ia memahami esensi kehidupan. Perjalanannya yang luas memperluas pemahamannya tentang dunia, meningkatkan ranah puitisnya. Perjuangannya diubah menjadi sajak yang mendalam.

sourceText: Edo Period (1603-1868)
translatedText: Periode Edo (1603-1868)

sourceText: William Wilberforce
translatedText: William Wilberforce

sourceText: His lifelong campaign against the slave trade was fraught with immense opposition, political pressure, and personal attacks. Health issues and bouts of despair also plagued him.
translatedText: Kampanye seumur hidupnya melawan perdagangan budak penuh dengan penolakan besar, tekanan politik, dan serangan pribadi. Masalah kesehatan dan serangan keputusasaan juga melandanya.

sourceText: Fueled by deep conviction, the support of allies, and his Christian faith, he persevered through setbacks, relentlessly advocating for legislation in Parliament.
translatedText: Didorong oleh keyakinan yang mendalam, dukungan sekutu, dan iman Kristennya, ia gigih melalui kemunduran, tanpa henti mengadvokasi undang-undang di Parlemen.

sourceText: Late 18th - Early 19th Century
translatedText: Akhir Abad ke-18 - Awal Abad ke-19

sourceText: Toussaint Louverture
translatedText: Toussaint Louverture

sourceText: He endured the brutal system of slavery and racial discrimination under French colonial rule. Furthermore, he suffered through numerous wars, internal conflicts, and betrayals during the struggle for independence.
translatedText: Ia menanggung sistem perbudakan brutal dan diskriminasi rasial di bawah kekuasaan kolonial Prancis. Selain itu, ia menderita melalui berbagai perang, konflik internal, dan pengkhianatan selama perjuangan kemerdekaan.

sourceText: He successfully led the slave rebellion, declared Haiti's independence, abolished slavery, and worked towards rebuilding the nation. His leadership and dedication brought freedom and hope to the people of Haiti.
translatedText: Ia berhasil memimpin pemberontakan budak, mendeklarasikan kemerdekaan Haiti, menghapus perbudakan, dan bekerja menuju pembangunan kembali bangsa. Kepemimpinan dan dedikasinya membawa kebebasan dan harapan bagi rakyat Haiti.

sourceText: Late 18th - Early 19th Century
translatedText: Akhir Abad ke-18 - Awal Abad ke-19

sourceText: Sojourner Truth
translatedText: Sojourner Truth

sourceText: Born into slavery, she endured brutal abuse, family separations, and the denial of her basic human rights. She was illiterate and faced profound racism and sexism even after gaining her freedom.
translatedText: Lahir sebagai budak, ia menanggung perlakuan kejam, perpisahan keluarga, dan penolakan hak asasi manusianya. Ia buta huruf dan menghadapi rasisme serta seksisme mendalam bahkan setelah mendapatkan kebebasannya.

sourceText: Guided by her deep faith and an unyielding spirit, she became a powerful voice for abolition and women's rights. She used her personal experiences and eloquent oratory to awaken consciences and demand justice.
translatedText: Didorong oleh iman yang mendalam dan semangat yang tak tergoyahkan, ia menjadi suara yang kuat untuk penghapusan perbudakan dan hak-hak perempuan. Ia menggunakan pengalaman pribadinya dan kemampuan berpidato yang fasih untuk membangkitkan kesadaran dan menuntut keadilan.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: Emmeline Pankhurst
translatedText: Emmeline Pankhurst

sourceText: The oppressive nature of a male-dominated society, political disenfranchisement, repeated arrests and imprisonment, the physical toll of hunger strikes, and the suffering of her family.
translatedText: Sifat menindas masyarakat yang didominasi pria, penghilangan hak politik, penangkapan dan pemenjaraan berulang, dampak fisik dari mogok makan, dan penderitaan keluarganya.

sourceText: Through strong leadership, strategic protests, solidarity with fellow suffragettes, and an unyielding determination, she helped change societal perceptions and ultimately achieve voting rights for women.
translatedText: Melalui kepemimpinan yang kuat, protes strategis, solidaritas dengan sesama suffragette, dan tekad yang tak tergoyahkan, ia membantu mengubah persepsi masyarakat dan pada akhirnya mencapai hak suara bagi perempuan.

sourceText: Late 19th - Early 20th Century
translatedText: Akhir Abad ke-19 - Awal Abad ke-20

sourceText: The relentless oppression and injustice under Spanish colonial rule, the suffering of his fellow Filipinos, and his own imprisonment, exile, and eventual execution due to his advocacy for reform and his writings.
translatedText: Penindasan dan ketidakadilan yang tiada henti di bawah kekuasaan kolonial Spanyol, penderitaan rekan-rekan sebangsanya Filipina, serta pemenjaraan, pengasingan, dan akhirnya eksekusinya sendiri karena advokasinya untuk reformasi dan tulisan-tulisannya.

sourceText: He championed reform through education and literature, believing in the power of reason and enlightenment to effect change. His martyrdom galvanized the Philippine independence movement, inspiring future generations.
translatedText: Ia memperjuangkan reformasi melalui pendidikan dan sastra, percaya pada kekuatan nalar dan pencerahan untuk membawa perubahan. Kemartirannya menggugah gerakan kemerdekaan Filipina, menginspirasi generasi mendatang.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: Mary Wollstonecraft
translatedText: Mary Wollstonecraft

sourceText: Women faced severe limitations in educational opportunities and were socially subordinate. She also endured financial hardships and personal relationship struggles.
translatedText: Wanita menghadapi batasan parah dalam kesempatan pendidikan dan secara sosial subordinat. Ia juga menanggung kesulitan keuangan dan perjuangan hubungan pribadi.

sourceText: She channeled her experiences and beliefs into writing, advocating for women's rational capabilities and challenging societal prejudices. She championed educational reform and women's independence to overcome these obstacles.
translatedText: Ia menyalurkan pengalaman dan keyakinannya ke dalam tulisan, mengadvokasi kemampuan rasional wanita dan menantang prasangka masyarakat. Ia memperjuangkan reformasi pendidikan dan kemandirian wanita untuk mengatasi hambatan ini.

sourceText: 18th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-18

sourceText: Lucretia Mott
translatedText: Lucretia Mott

sourceText: As a woman and an abolitionist, Mott faced significant societal prejudice and ostracism. She was denied the right to speak at anti-slavery conventions and faced public scorn for her radical views.
translatedText: Sebagai seorang wanita dan seorang abolisionis, Mott menghadapi prasangka sosial dan pengucilan yang signifikan. Ia ditolak haknya untuk berbicara di konvensi anti-perbudakan dan menghadapi cemoohan publik atas pandangan radikalnya.

sourceText: Mott channeled her frustrations into action, becoming a powerful orator and organizer. She co-founded numerous organizations, including the Philadelphia Female Anti-Slavery Society, and steadfastly advocated for both women's rights and the end of slavery, inspiring many.
translatedText: Mott menyalurkan frustrasinya menjadi tindakan, menjadi orator dan organisator yang kuat. Ia mendirikan banyak organisasi, termasuk Philadelphia Female Anti-Slavery Society, dan dengan teguh mengadvokasi hak-hak perempuan dan penghapusan perbudakan, menginspirasi banyak orang.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Abad ke-19

sourceText: Arduous journeys, unfamiliar cultures and languages, illness, and imprisonment.
translatedText: Perjalanan yang sulit, budaya dan bahasa yang tidak dikenal, penyakit, dan pemenjaraan.

sourceText: Through keen observation, adaptability, and persistent documentation, he came to understand and inform Europe about the unfamiliar world.
translatedText: Melalui pengamatan tajam, kemampuan beradaptasi, dan dokumentasi yang gigih, ia akhirnya memahami dan memberi informasi kepada Eropa tentang dunia yang tidak dikenal.
